data.title: Veem Ltd Reports Decline in Revenue and Net Profit for 2024 Half-Year
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Veem Ltd ( (AU:VEE) ).

Veem Ltd reported a 10% decrease in revenue from ordinary activities, totaling AUD 35,559,000, and a 71% decline in net profit to AUD 1,018,000 for the period ending December 31, 2024, compared to the previous year. Despite the financial downturn, the company declared an unfranked interim dividend of AUD 312,270, representing approximately 30% of the net profit after tax for the half-year, showcasing a commitment to returning value to shareholders amidst challenging market conditions.

More about Veem Ltd

Veem Ltd is a company that operates in the manufacturing industry, primarily producing and supplying precision engineering products. The company’s market focus includes sectors such as marine, aerospace, defense, and industrial markets.

YTD Price Performance: -29.75%

Average Trading Volume: 126,064

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$115.4M

Osisko Gold Royalties ( (TSE:OR) ) has shared an update.

Osisko Gold Royalties Ltd announced a first quarter 2025 dividend of C$0.065 per common share, payable on April 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2025. The company also highlighted its dividend reinvestment plan available to Canadian and U.S. shareholders, offering an opportunity to reinvest dividends into additional shares, potentially influencing shareholder value and engagement.

More about Osisko Gold Royalties

Osisko Gold Royalties Ltd operates in the mining industry, focusing on acquiring and managing a portfolio of royalties and streams primarily in the gold sector. The company is known for its strategic investments in high-quality precious metal assets, enhancing its market position in the North American mining sector.

data.title: InPlay Oil Corp. Acquires Pembina Cardium Assets in Major Expansion Move
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

InPlay Oil Corp. ( (TSE:IPO) ) has provided an announcement.

InPlay Oil Corp. has announced a strategic acquisition of light oil assets in the Pembina area from Obsidian Energy Ltd. for approximately $309 million. This acquisition is set to significantly increase InPlay’s production capacity and operational synergies, with over 100% increase in production and a 170% increase in light oil output, strengthening their shareholder return profile and free funds flow, while maintaining low decline, long-life reserves.

More about InPlay Oil Corp.

InPlay Oil Corp. is a company operating in the oil and gas industry, primarily focusing on the production of Cardium light oil. They are active in the Pembina area of Alberta, seeking opportunities to enhance their market presence and production capabilities.

data.description:

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Triple Flag Precious Metals ( (TSE:TFPM) ) has shared an update.

Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. announced a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.055 per common share, to be distributed on March 14, 2025, to shareholders recorded by March 3, 2025. This dividend declaration signifies the company’s stable financial position and commitment to delivering shareholder value, reinforcing its strategic positioning within the precious metals industry.

More about Triple Flag Precious Metals

Triple Flag Precious Metals is a streaming and royalty company that provides financing solutions to the metals and mining industry, focusing on gold and silver. The company has investments in 236 assets across the Americas and Australia, including 17 streams and 219 royalties, supporting mines at various stages of their life cycle.

data.title: China Tontine Wines Faces Unauthorized Equity Transfers
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from China Tontine Wines Group ( (HK:0389) ) is now available.

China Tontine Wines Group Limited announced unauthorized transfers of entire equity interests in Ji An Yaluo Wine Estate and Tontine Green to Shuangfei Grape Wine without the board’s approval. The company is currently assessing the impact of these transfers on its operations and financial position, while seeking legal advice to address the situation.

More about China Tontine Wines Group

China Tontine Wines Group Limited operates in the wine industry, specializing in the manufacture and sale of wine products and the processing of grape juice. Additionally, it engages in grape plantation through its subsidiary, Tontine Green, which owns vineyards.
